base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of palette_lance_blue — a character from 1987 contra. Player-2 Lance — blue palette variant of all above poses. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
